description_long: This is a compact, modern submachine gun with a distinctive angular polymer frame and a matte black finish. The weapon features a long, flat top rail for mounting optics or accessories, and a short, cylindrical barrel with a prominent muzzle device. The magazine is inserted at an angle in front of the trigger guard, and the grip is ergonomically shaped with textured surfaces for secure handling. The stock is minimalistic, extending straight back with a skeletal design and a small shoulder rest. Visible controls include a fire selector and magazine release, and the overall design emphasizes lightweight construction and modularity. The weapon's exterior is primarily composed of polymer and metal, giving it a tactical, utilitarian appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A compact, angular submachine gun with a matte black finish, top accessory rail, angled magazine, and minimalist skeletal stock. Its design is modern and tactical, emphasizing lightweight materials and modularity.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, angular frame, top rail, angled magazine, and skeletal stock.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the cylindrical barrel, muzzle device, and narrow profile of the weapon.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same angular frame, top rail, and skeletal stock, with controls and magazine visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the slim, straight stock and the alignment of the top rail and barrel.
attribute_barrel_type: short cylindrical barrel with prominent muzzle device
attribute_stock_design: minimalist skeletal polymer stock with straight extension and small shoulder rest
